producthunt.name: Kanwas
producthunt.tagline: An open-source brain for your team
producthunt.description: For you, your agent, your coworker and their agent. It holds the team's critical know-how, research, decisions and data. But it's not a dead storage. It's a workspace that makes the context workable for humans as well as agents.

producthunt.name: Shadow 2.0
producthunt.tagline: The work your meetings create, done before they end
producthunt.description: Every online call creates a to-do list. Shadow clears it live. It understands your conversation, tracks what needs to happen, and executes tasks in real time. PDF creation, slide generation, CRM updates, follow-ups, and scheduling before the call ends. Our goal is to have no post-call work. Just stay focused while Shadow handles everything in the background. Starting with core workflows and expanding to everything your calls create.

producthunt.name: Superset 2.0
producthunt.tagline: Run 100s of coding agents on any machine from anywhere
producthunt.description: Run 100s parallel coding agents, offload them to different machines. Rewritten from scratch to support remote workspaces. Share and collaborate with teammates in realtime. Works for any CLI agent.
